name: Plantain Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 large Green Plantains, sliced 1 inch thick
Salt & Freshly Ground Black Pepper - to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and slice plantains into 1-inch thick slices.
2. Dip the plantain slices in lemon juice.
3. Sauté the plantain slices in oil over low heat, stirring constantly.
4. Add the chopped tomato and seasoning.
5. Transfer the mixture to an oiled casserole dish with a lid.
6. Bake at 275°F for 1½ hours.
